name: Nebius AI Studio
pricing_notes: Per-token pricing; Llama-3.3-70B ~$0.13/M tokens, competitive European pricing

performance.notes: European data centers; lower latency for EU users; competitive throughput for open models

agent_readiness.notes: OpenAI-compatible API; supports Llama 3.x, Mistral, DeepSeek, Qwen models. EU GDPR-compliant. GPU cluster also available for fine-tuning.

gotchas: Batch processing API not yet available
Documentation less comprehensive than major US providers
Less community support and ecosystem tooling
best_when: Teams wanting OpenAI-compatible API with European data residency
Yandex ecosystem users migrating to cloud-neutral infrastructure
avoid_when: Need batch processing or advanced features
summary: Nebius AI Studio (from former Yandex Cloud team) provides OpenAI-compatible inference for open-source LLMs with EU data residency and GDPR compliance. Competitive pricing for Llama, Mistral, DeepSeek models. Best value proposition for European teams needing cost-effective open-model inference without US data transfer.
